description: Iranian-backed paramilitary umbrella group operating within Iraq, formally part of the Iraqi Armed Forces but de facto under Iranian control. Formed in 2014 to fight the Islamic State, it comprises about 67 primarily Shia armed factions. The PMF has been involved in major battles in Iraq and Syria and is designated as a terrorist group by some countries for certain factions.

country_links.evidence_quote: The most powerful groups within the Popular Mobilization Forces are the groups which maintain strong ties with Iran and pledge spiritual allegiance to Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.
country_links.context: The PMF maintains strong ties with Iran, receives weapons and funding from Iran, and its leaders pledge allegiance to Iran's Supreme Leader.

country_links.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel , United States , Saudi Arabia , Kuwait , Iraq (sometimes)
country_links.context: The PMF is an opponent of Israel and has been involved in the Iran–Israel proxy conflict.

country_links.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel , United States , Saudi Arabia , Kuwait , Iraq (sometimes)
country_links.context: The PMF is an opponent of Kuwait.

country_links.evidence_quote: Allies: State allies Iran , Iraq , Russia , Syria (until 2024)
country_links.context: Russia is listed as a state ally of the PMF.

country_links.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel , United States , Saudi Arabia , Kuwait , Iraq (sometimes)
country_links.context: The PMF is an opponent of Saudi Arabia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Khomeinist PMF militia factions loyal to the Iranian Supreme Leader have been heavily deployed in the Syrian civil war on the side of the Assad regime...
country_links.context: PMF militia factions loyal to Iran have been deployed in the Syrian civil war on the side of the Assad regime.

country_links.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel , United States , Saudi Arabia , Kuwait , Iraq (sometimes)
country_links.context: The PMF is an opponent of the United States and has conducted attacks on US bases during the Gaza war.
